gamerule.easyop.commandBlockOutput: Whether command blocks should notify admins when they perform a command.
gamerule.easyop.commandBlocksEnabled: Whether command blocks are enabled in the game.
gamerule.easyop.doDaylightCycle: Whether the daylight cycle and moon phases progress.
gamerule.easyop.doFireTick: Whether fire should spread and naturally expire.
gamerule.easyop.doImmediateRespawn: Whether players respawn immediately without showing the death screen.
gamerule.easyop.doInsomnia: Whether phantoms can spawn in the night.
gamerule.easyop.doLimitedCrafting: Whether players can only craft with unlocked recipes.
gamerule.easyop.doMobLoot: Whether mobs drop items upon death.
gamerule.easyop.doTileDrops: Whether blocks drop items when broken.
gamerule.easyop.functionCommandLimit: The maximum number of commands that can be executed via /function.
gamerule.easyop.keepInventory: Whether players keep their inventory and XP after death.
gamerule.easyop.locatorBar: Whether the locator bar is displayed.
gamerule.easyop.maxCommandChainLength: Determines the total number of commands that can be executed in a chain.
gamerule.easyop.mobGriefing: Whether mobs are allowed to perform destructive actions.
gamerule.easyop.naturalRegeneration: Whether players can naturally regenerate health if they have enough hunger.
gamerule.easyop.playersSleepingPercentag: The percentage of players required to sleep to skip the night.
gamerule.easyop.projectilesCanBreakBlock: Whether projectiles can break chorus flowers, pointed dripstone, and decorated pots.
gamerule.easyop.pvp: Whether players can deal damage to each other.
gamerule.easyop.randomTickSpeed: The frequency of random block ticks per chunk per tick.
gamerule.easyop.recipesUnlock: Whether recipes need to be unlocked.
gamerule.easyop.respawnBlocksExplode: Whether beds and respawn anchors explode in other dimensions.
gamerule.easyop.sendCommandFeedback: Whether command feedback is shown in the chat.
gamerule.easyop.showBorderEffect: Whether the world border emits red particles.
gamerule.easyop.showCoordinates: Whether coordinates are displayed continuously in the chat area.
gamerule.easyop.showDaysPlayed: Whether the number of days played is displayed in the top left corner.
gamerule.easyop.showDeathMessages: Whether death messages are shown in the chat.
gamerule.easyop.showRecipeMessages: Whether a message is shown when a recipe is unlocked.
gamerule.easyop.spawnRadius: The distance from the world spawn point within which new players and players without a spawn point respawn.
